recipe.steps: Define the genres for which narration scripts need to be generated: technology, health, sports, business, and entertainment.
Fetch the top news article for each genre from the previously stored news content in memory.
Loop through each genre, extract the important details from the news article, and create a narration script.
recipe.generalized_functions:
```python
def generate_narration_script(news_article):
    title = news_article.get('title', '')
    description = news_article.get('description', '')
    url = news_article.get('url', '')
    source = news_article.get('source', {}).get('name', '')

    script = f"Here is the latest update in {source}. {title}. {description}. For more details, visit {url}."
    return script

news_content = {
    'technology': {'title': 'Tech Title', 'description': 'Tech Description', 'url': 'http://tech.news', 'source': {'name': 'Tech Source'}},
    'health': {'title': 'Health Title', 'description': 'Health Description', 'url': 'http://health.news', 'source': {'name': 'Health Source'}},
    'sports': {'title': 'Sports Title', 'description': 'Sports Description', 'url': 'http://sports.news', 'source': {'name': 'Sports Source'}},
    'business': {'title': 'Business Title', 'description': 'Business Description', 'url': 'http://business.news', 'source': {'name': 'Business Source'}},
    'entertainment': {'title': 'Entertainment Title', 'description': 'Entertainment Description', 'url': 'http://entertainment.news', 'source': {'name': 'Entertainment Source'}}
}

narration_scripts = {}
for genre, article in news_content.items():
    script = generate_narration_script(article)
    narration_scripts[genre] = script

print(narration_scripts)
```

recipe.steps: Save the generated narration scripts in memory using the save_data_in_memory tool.
